heading: Create an Atlas Resource Policy Configuration
body:
To create an Atlas Resource Policy, use the following procedure to construct a policy by using [Cedar policy language](https://docs.cedarpolicy.com/)
and add to Atlas by using the Atlas UI, the Atlas Administration API, or Terraform.> **Warning:** We recommend that you test this feature in a non-production environment by creating
> a new organization with a fresh cluster.
> This ensures you can assess the feature safely without impacting your existing systems as you skill up.**Api:**Atlas Administration APITo create an Atlas Resource Policy using the Atlas Administration API, construct a policy using
[Cedar policy language](https://docs.cedarpolicy.com/) and pass it in to the Atlas Administration API via a `POST` request
using the `policies` parameter.
